heading: Taimaka mana magance matsaloli cikin sauri
description: Rahoton ku yana ƙirƙirar matsala a GitHub don masu kula da shi su duba.
safetyWarning: Kiyaye wannan rahoto lafiya ga jama'a. Kada ku saka bayanan sirri, adiresoshin imel, lambobin waya, adiresoshin gida/aiki, ko asirin asusu.
screenshots: Hotunan allo ko hanyoyin haɗi na rikodin
screenshotsPlaceholder: Manna hanyoyin haɗi zuwa hotunan allo, bidiyo, ko fayilolin girgije
errorApi404: API na rahoton matsala ba ya samuwa a wannan yanayin. Idan kuna gwadawa a gida, yi amfani da shafin da aka ɗora.
errorApi403: Ba a yarda da wannan tushe ya aika rahoton matsaloli ba. Duba APP_ORIGINS a yanayin baya.
errorApi500: Ba a saita sabis na rahoton matsala ba tukuna. Tabbatar da alamar GitHub da masu canjin yanayin ma'ajiya.
errorApi502: Ƙirƙirar matsala a GitHub ta gaza. Sake gwadawa nan da minti ɗaya.
errorApiGeneric: Ba za mu iya aika rahoton matsalar ku a yanzu ba (HTTP {{status}}).
errorNetwork: Kuskuren cibiyar sadarwa wajen aika rahoton matsala. Duba haɗin ku kuma sake gwadawa.
errorGeneric: Wani abu ya samu kuskure. Don Allah sake gwadawa.
successMessage: An ƙirƙiri matsala #{{number}} cikin nasara kuma tana shirye don dubawa.
